mapper.sql: SELECT e.id, e.student_id, s.name AS student_name, e.course_id, c.name AS course_name, c.instructor_id AS course_instructor_id, e.start_date, e.end_date, e.status, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM enrollments e INNER JOIN students s ON e.student_id = s.id INNER JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enrollments e INNER JOIN courses c ON e.course_id = c.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enrollments ( student_id, course_id, start_date, end_date, status ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status} )
